summary: Bug fix iteration 12 testing complete. The 't.map is not a function' error on ADMIN pages has been FIXED. All 9 admin pages load without white screen. All API endpoints return correct data types (arrays/objects). Array.isArray guards are properly applied in all admin page components.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings about span inside select/option - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: /admin/dashboard loads with 4 analytics charts and stats cards
Login flow: admin/admin123 -> dashboard works correctly
No console errors with 't.map' on any admin page
Backend: GET /api/usuarios with auth returns array (1 user)
Backend: GET /api/leads with auth returns array (8 leads)
Backend: GET /api/media with auth returns array (7 files)
Backend: GET /api/nosotros-settings returns object with valores/stats arrays
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: AdminEmpresas.jsx uses Array.isArray on setEmpresas and categories guard
Bug fix verified: AdminUsuarios.jsx uses Array.isArray on setUsuarios + has empty state UI
Bug fix verified: AdminLeads.jsx uses Array.isArray on setLeads
Bug fix verified: AdminMedia.jsx uses Array.isArray on setMediaFiles
Bug fix verified: AdminActividades.jsx uses Array.isArray on setActividades
Bug fix verified: AdminArticulos.jsx uses Array.isArray on setArticulos
Bug fix verified: AdminCategorias.jsx uses Array.isArray on setCategorias (from response.data.categorias)
Bug fix verified: AdminNosotros.jsx uses Array.isArray on valores and stats arrays
Note: AdminNosotros route is /admin/nosotros-editor (not /admin/nosotros as mentioned in test request)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for 't.map is not a function' on ADMIN pages verified complete. All admin page components have Array.isArray guards. Iteration 11 fixed PUBLIC pages, iteration 12 fixed ADMIN pages. SMTP email is MOCKED. Note: AdminNosotros page route is /admin/nosotros-editor (not /admin/nosotros).

mocked_apis.SMTP_email: Configured but not functional - silently skips due to missing SMTP credentials in .env

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: t.map is not a function error causing white screen on admin pages (/admin/empresas, /admin/usuarios, /admin/leads, /admin/media, /admin/actividades)
root_causes_fixed: 1. AdminEmpresas.jsx: Added Array.isArray guard on setEmpresas and categories extraction
2. AdminUsuarios.jsx: Added Array.isArray guard on setUsuarios + empty state UI
3. AdminLeads.jsx: Added Array.isArray guard on setLeads
4. AdminMedia.jsx: Added Array.isArray guard on setMediaFiles
5. AdminActividades.jsx: Added Array.isArray guard on setActividades
6. AdminArticulos.jsx: Added Array.isArray guard on setArticulos
7. AdminCategorias.jsx: Added Array.isArray guard on setCategorias
8. AdminNosotros.jsx: Added Array.isArray guard on valores and stats
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: FIXED - All 9 admin pages load without white screen or console errors
